event: View of an orchard house courtyard in Valencia
description: A quick oil study of a whitewashed courtyard with a large arched doorway at center. A white donkey or horse stands beneath a wooden pergola or trellis. Terracotta pots and greenery are scattered around. The walls are bright white with warm shadows, and the ground is sun-dappled. The brushwork is loose and spontaneous, capturing Mediterranean light with warm ochres, whites, and touches of green. A red cloth or curtain hangs to the right.
